title: crucianella gilanica subsp. gilanica
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. gilanica, also known as Gilan Crucianella, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of Iran. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Gilan Crucianella include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
